Necklaces

The Art of Gold

Necklaces · Hand-forged in 22k

Each necklace is a conversation between metal and skin — hand-forged from 22k gold, shaped by artisans who measure beauty in millimetres. Worn close to the heart, made to outlast a lifetime.
